title: The Real Discomfort | HG Amitasana Dasa
speaker: HG Amitasana Dasa

segments.text: So Prabhupada says if every one of us we analyze what's happening in this world
people are struggling and everyone is trying to find solution to the
challenges what they are facing individually collectively nationally
internationally so there's a struggle for existence different kinds of
kleshas hitting the living entities and attempts are being made to find peace
find happiness so Prabhupada says the whole world people are very active to
like for example somebody does not have a house
how he can own a house
take a loan from the bank, pay the EMI
somebody who doesn't have a car
when it rains, he gets drenched
he is trying to get hold of a car
the cars are there, roads are not
we all are facing some discomforts
and we are trying to find solutions
but those solutions are of temporary discomforts
which Krishna says will come and go
anxious about or is trying to find a solution
Because life after life we are caught up in the cycle of birth and death and taking material bodies we have to face all these discomforts for which we are finding solutions.

But in human form of life we have the ability and opportunity to find solution to the actual problem, actual discomfort that the living entity which is implicated in the meshes of these modes conditioned.
And taking birth again and again.
